organisation.advisor_note: Priya suggested setting up Xero in January 2026 as a parallel set of books to give Amanda a second source of truth and to make a possible LLC conversion easier in 2027. Amanda dual-posted from January through late August. Dual posting stopped at the end of August because Amanda's evening shifts ran long and the manual reentry was getting skipped.

linked_payment_feeds.name: Square
linked_payment_feeds.note: Token refresh failed in early September. Amanda received a notice email but did not action it. Most September Square transactions did not flow through. See gmail/inbox_snapshot.json for the Xero notice email.

linked_payment_feeds.name: Stripe
linked_payment_feeds.note: Two payouts after September 12 did not import.
